title: Beyond the Wall
lines: You tear away the peeling wallpaper. Behind it, the attic wall has been replaced by a rough-hewn wooden tunnel that defies the laws of physical space.
A sickly violet light pulses from deep within the abyss. It is alien, terrifying, and pulses with a rhythm that matches the beating of your own terrified heart.

options.desc: 1. Crawl into the glowing violet tunnel
2. Listen to the low hum coming from the wall
3. Stare into the amethyst light until it hurts
